entryCriteria.formula: OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Arbitration Coordinator Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 0 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Top Care Specialist') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 0 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ) )

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 0 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 0 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Top Care Specialist') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 3000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Arbitration Coordinator Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ) )

approvalStep.description: Assign to Manager of Manager of Manager

entryCriteria.formula: OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 3000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 3000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Top Care Specialist') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Arbitration Coordinator Canada') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ) )

approvalStep.label: Level 3
approvalStep.name: Step_3

entryCriteria.formula: OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 5000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Top Care Specialist') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ) )

OR( (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Junior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ), (CONTAINS(CreatedBy.UserRole.Name ,'Specialist Senior') && ISPICKVAL(CC_Status__c , 'Submitted') && CC_TotalAmount__c > 10000 && CC_TotalAmount__c <= 999999 ) )

ApprovalProcess.description:
This approval process is made for the Canada region pertaining to Approvals created for anyone other than the owner. Details in CC-544.
Added New Roles (Arbitration Coordinator and Top care specialist )as part of STRY0483222 story
ApprovalProcess.label: Canada Approval Process For Non Owner
